text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Here we are, at the Yasuda Kinen. This is where
this spring's King of the Mile is crowned.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The longest stretch in Tokyo... I'm sure everyone'll
be givin' their all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that's just gonna make winnin' even sweeter!
Like comin' in from the side and takin' out a
bunch of souped-up monster trucks with the best
engines!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It doesn't get better than that! Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Course I can, assumin' the footwork we worked on
is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll accelerate like I'm glidin' over the track and
reach top speed in a second!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Long as I nail that, I'm dead sure I can win it—no
matter who I'm up against!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is where the new me is gonna be born!
choice_data_list: All right, go give the fans a show!
All right, go give the fans a show!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Gettin' worked up like this all by
myself is kinda lame.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The stands are packed, so I've gotta get each and
every fan worked up with my new weapon!
